title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic has warned about AI self-improvement where Claude is now writing code, reviewing experiments, and assisting in AI development. OpenAI is making similar warnings. The concern centers on AI systems potentially entering recursive self-improvement cycles where humans set goals but AI handles implementation work.
